title: 6/7/19 Swam 9,345 meters, dropped car at mechanic

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder vlog. I didn't get any sleep last night.
Not even a single second of sleep. I was just laying up all night long.
This is take two of my video. My mom called me while I was talking.
So I think I'll just start it all over again.
They don't have it set up on these iPhones where you can be recording a video
And then if somebody calls, it doesn't interrupt you, you know.
They should have a little thing on the corner that says somebody's calling,
You can just ignore and keep talking on the video, you know,
Or choose to stop the video yourself, but it stops it for you.
So, yeah, I'm yawning my ass off because I didn't get any sleep.
And this is getting really, this is becoming a crisis.
I might have to start taking pills.
I took a CBD last night and a melatonin and it didn't do anything.
I was just up like this all night long.
And I got exercise yesterday.
I swam 9,345 meters yesterday and so you'd think I'd be tired.
So, I know one thing does get me, you know,
I don't want to do sleeping pills because that's bad for you,
But I know that THC pills get you tired.
I know that THC pills get you tired.
But then you get high as fuck.
And I don't really want to be high anymore.
But, you know, I'd rather be able to sleep and be high than not be able to sleep.
So, I was thinking about just working out all day long.
It's snow, it's raining today.
And so, I can't go outside, but I have my foot pod.
Garmin gave me another foot pod.
The original one that I bought wasn't working, wasn't connecting to Zwift.
And so, they sent me another one and it did, it connected right away.
So, I'm super jazzed about that.
I can run on my treadmill today.
That'll be fun.
And watch Zwift and listen to my audio book.
I didn't listen to my, I wanted to finish Popular History of Ireland in four days.
Because it was, it was 2,000 pages long.
And, so I wanted to average 500 pages a day and get it over with, man.
For some stupid ass reason, I chose one of the longer books to do my first book.
And so, I just want to do the book, do the book, do the book.
But, it's, I can't finish it.
It's too damn big.
I didn't listen to any of it yesterday because I was, I went swimming and I didn't have it set up where I could just put something new on my, my audio, on my iPod shuffle.
Because I had to select certain songs in order to fit it in.
It only has two gigabytes.
So, I have to figure out how to get the playlist off and then back on, like, all in one, all in one, you know, go.
So, I might just, you know, create my own playlist on the computer and then I can just drag all those songs over.
Just, just remember, you know, a new folder just for those songs.
And then I can put books on because the sound is pretty good, I think.
Good enough to listen to in the pool.
At least it was with the new earphones.
But then, I went into the pool yesterday and, and these earphones that I bought for, these new earphones I bought for 50 bucks, they weren't playing at all on the left side.
So, I had to go, come back home and get the original ones and then those play.
I'm going to see if I can send those back to Amazon because I spent 50 bucks on them.
Um, yeah, most of my electronics doesn't work the first time.
My iPod, my foot pod, and then the earphones.
Um, so, yeah, I wish I could, I wish I could talk about my, um, about what I dreamt about, but I didn't sleep.
I wanted to, I wanted to, I wanted to do the swimming at the reservoir this summer.
It starts on May 24th, which is only in a couple weeks, but the problem is, um, it's, it's open from 6 a.m. to 7.30.
And if I keep up how I am now, I'm going to have to be showing up there after no sleep because I don't sleep.
Um, and, uh, so I guess I'll have to go practice in the pool at 6 in the morning with, even if I don't get any sleep, just to prove to myself that I can swim for an hour and a half.
Oh, whoops, I forgot to put my new pillow.
Sorry, this, this cover keeps falling off.
So, I know that I can swim for an hour and a half straight on no sleep, so it's kind of a bummer.
But, you know, if this keeps going, like, I'll, I'll, if this keeps going, I'm going to, um, um, yeah, I'm going to have to get back on the THC pills, man.
But whatever, at least, you know, I can still function on THC.
I've been doing it for years.
Um, so, yeah, I just dropped off my phone, my car at the auto place, auto, auto store, because, um, uh, the, uh, the, uh, mechanic, because, um, it had a, uh, gas leak on near the rear right wheel.
So, hopefully, that's not too much.
Um, and, uh, then I have to get it registered, oohs.
So, um, whatever, this month is kind of a big expense.
Um, so, yeah, I'm going to lay, I have to be at my mom's house.
In, like, an hour, she wanted me to vacuum her house.
So, I'm going to lay down and see if I can get some relaxation.
Um, and then I'll come back and, I guess, start my exercising.
All right, later.
Oh, and listen, I'm trying to finish the book.
Later.
